overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game showing a character in a white coat exploring the industrial interior of a spaceship or space station. The character walks through metal storage corridors, passes various functional bays including Medical and Cargo, traverses an elevated glass walkway with indoor vegetation, and approaches a classroom entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corridor with metal shelving units

events.description: approaching and entering the large circular airlock doorway marked Command Bay

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the storage corridor toward the circular airlock door

entered.detail: tall industrial metal shelving units with various supplies
stacked plastic bins and boxes on the left side
large circular metal airlock door with yellow hazard stripes
industrial ceiling lights illuminating the corridor
scattered cardboard boxes and crates on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial storage corridor lined with metal shelving units and storage containers. The environment is dimly lit with overhead fluorescent lights as the character approaches a large circular airlock door marked for Command Bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: main corridor with medical and cargo bay access

events.description: turning left toward the Lift and Command Bay directional signs
entering the elevated walkway area with glass walls and metal railings

agents.ego_description: walking through the main corridor passing Medical Bay and Cargo Bay before turning left toward the walkway

entered.detail: open doorway leading to Medical Bay with visible interior
illuminated sign indicating Cargo Bay direction
illuminated directional sign for Command Bay
sign indicating Lift access to the left
simple metal bench along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a utilitarian corridor passing doorways to Medical Bay and Cargo Bay, illuminated by overhead industrial lighting. Directional signage for Lift and Command Bay becomes visible as the character turns left and approaches a transition to an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with glass walls and indoor vegetation

events.description: encountering an NPC in a brown coat leaning on the railing looking down
passing by glass-walled office area with workers visible inside

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway passing indoor plants and glass-walled offices while approaching another character

notable_agents.action: leaning on the metal railing looking down at the lower level

entered.detail: metal and glass safety railing along the elevated walkway
tall green plants and trees growing in planters along the left side
view through glass floor to industrial machinery and decks below
glass partition walls revealing an office interior with desks
circular analog clock mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an elevated walkway featuring glass railings and abundant indoor vegetation contrasting with the industrial metal structure. An NPC in a brown coat stands leaning on the railing, and glass-walled offices reveal workers inside as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: clean white corridor leading to classroom

events.description: entering the cleaner white corridor from the industrial walkway area
stopping at the classroom entrance to look inside

agents.ego_description: walking through the white corridor and stopping at the classroom entrance to observe the interior

entered.detail: smooth white painted walls contrasting with previous industrial areas
large oval window showing the indoor garden area from previous segment
illuminated sign above doorway reading CLASSROOM
wall-mounted board with TODAY'S LESSONS heading
rows of desks and chairs visible inside the classroom

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cleaner, white-walled corridor with a viewing window overlooking the previous garden area. The character approaches a doorway marked CLASSROOM with a bulletin board displaying TODAY'S LESSONS, then stops at the entrance to look inside at the desks and interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial facility that evolves from a dim storage area into a bright, academic environment. It begins in a narrow storage corridor lined with metal shelving and containers, moving under flickering fluorescent lights toward a large circular airlock door marked for the Command Bay. As the character passes through a utilitarian hallway with signage for the Medical and Cargo Bays, the scene opens up onto an elevated glass walkway where lush indoor vegetation contrasts with the surrounding metal structure. The camera then glides past an NPC leaning on a railing and glass-walled offices before transitioning into a clean, white-walled corridor with a viewing window overlooking the garden. Finally, the movement slows as the character approaches a doorway marked Classroom, stopping at a bulletin board to look inside at the desks.
